threads.label: Iran / Hormuz
threads.status_line: Trump Situation Room ended without decision; 60-day MOU agreed at working level but Trump hasn't signed; Iran publicly disputes terms as 'fabricated victory'; Brent at $90.71
expand_if: Iranian uranium concession or refusal made public

threads.label: Israel / Lebanon
threads.status_line: Pentagon trilateral meeting on ceasefire mechanics; UAE covert strikes on Iran revealed (Mirage jets, Wing Loong drones, Lavan Island refinery, coordinating with Israel); 29 killed in Lebanon in 24h
expand_if: Hezbollah rocket barrage on Israeli cities
US forces Israel to pause operations
UAE publicly acknowledges its strikes on Iran

threads.label: Ebola Bundibugyo — DRC / Uganda
threads.status_line: WHO declared PHEIC 17 May; 125 confirmed + 906 suspected cases, 223 suspected deaths as of 28 May; American patient transported to Germany (stable); Uganda 9 confirmed cases
expand_if: second American or European healthcare worker infected

threads.label: Turkey — CHP / Opposition
threads.status_line: Court ousted CHP leadership (annulled 2023 congress); police stormed HQ with tear gas; Özel calls it a coup attempt; Kılıçdaroğlu may return as leader; Imamoglu still imprisoned
expand_if: street protests escalate to general strike
constitutional court ruling on Imamoglu detention

threads.label: SNP Crisis / Murrell
threads.status_line: Peter Murrell guilty plea — £400K embezzled from SNP over 13 years (2010–2023); remanded in custody; sentencing 23 June
expand_if: sentencing on 23 June with significant prison term
SNP polling drops significantly in Scotland

threads.label: UK Economic Stress
threads.status_line: Bailey signals BOE may tolerate above-target inflation to support weak economy; 10Y gilt back above 5% (from <4.9%); Starmer faces 90+ Labour MPs calling for resignation after local election losses
expand_if: gilt yield spike above 5.5% with upward trajectory

threads.label: Tucker Carlson
threads.status_line: No new episode since May 23; anti-Trump positioning on Iran maintained; no pivot detected
expand_if: returns to pro-Trump framing on Iran
direct confrontation with White House escalates

threads.label: Mearsheimer
threads.status_line: No new Substack post since May 22; 'Eating Humble Pie' arguing Iran war is strategic loss for US remains the counter-frame
expand_if: shifts argument on a major topic

threads.label: Russia / NATO / Romania
threads.status_line: 28th drone incursion struck Galați apartment block injuring 2; Russia ambassador expelled; NATO invokes defence of every inch; Russia to close Bucharest embassy
expand_if: fatality from a drone strike in NATO territory
Romania retaliates or requests military reinforcement
NATO considers shoot-down authority for drones over Allied territory

retired_threads.label: Cannes 2026
retired_threads.retired_because: Festival closed May 23 — time-bounded event, no ongoing story
retired_threads.revive_if: Mungiu or another winner makes a politically significant statement in the press circuit; or Fjord triggers a specific diplomatic controversy

retired_threads.label: Venice Biennale 2026
retired_threads.retired_because: 7 consecutive days stable with last_changed 2026-05-22; no new incident or statement surfaced in today's research
retired_threads.revive_if: Pavilion closure, protest, prize announcement with political dimension, or Israeli/Palestinian pavilion controversy

retired_threads.label: Olivia Dean / UK Chart
retired_threads.retired_because: 7 consecutive days stable with last_changed 2026-05-22; chart positions unchanged for fifth consecutive week — divergence already documented, thread no longer generating new signal
retired_threads.revive_if: Loses #1, drops out of top 10, new single or album announcement, or chart run officially noted as record-breaking

source_discoveries.name: Richard Haass — 'Home & Away' Substack
source_discoveries.why_interesting: Former CFR president arguing Trump is recreating the JCPOA he destroyed, and that regime change pressure produced a more hardline Iranian government — structural counter-frame to deal optimism

source_discoveries.name: L'Orient Today
source_discoveries.why_interesting: English-language edition of L'Orient Le Jour; takes a meaningfully different political line from Al-Nahar on Lebanese politics; useful for south Lebanon coverage
